SoybeanMG.5
- Crop type: legume grain crop (C3).
- Nitrogen role: fixes nitrogen, so it is usually less dependent on external soil nitrogen than corn or wheat and can improve rotation value for following cereals.
- Rooting and water: deeper-rooted than SoybeanMG.3 (max root depth about 1.5 m) with moderate water demand.
- Temperature and maturity: warm-adapted (optimum development temperature about 28 C) and later-maturing than SoybeanMG.3 (maturity thermal time about 2250).
- Rotation role: similar to SoybeanMG.3, but with a longer season and deeper rooting profile.
